operation: First, a CadQuery workplane is initialized on the XY reference plane. A single solid sphere primitive is then generated on this workplane, with a defined radius of 5 length units, centered at the origin of the workplane coordinate system, with no further modification operations applied to the sphere.
geometry: This model consists of a single fully symmetric solid sphere with a uniform smooth curved surface. It is centered at the intersection of the three standard Cartesian reference planes, exhibits perfect symmetry across all three axes, and contains no additional cutouts, protrusions, or secondary features.
function: This is a standard solid spherical component suitable for use as a ball bearing element, calibration target, decorative part, or foundational primitive for building more complex 3D CAD assemblies.
